title: The University of Hyderabad Act, 1974
full_text: The University of Hyderabad Act, 1974 हैदराबाद विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1974 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197439 Act Number: 39 Enactment Date: 1974-09-03 Act Year: 1974 Short Title: The University of Hyderabad Act, 1974 Hindi Title: हैदराबाद विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1974 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching University in the State of Andhra Pradesh and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Notification: yet to be notified Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The University of Hyderabad Act, 1974 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The University. Section 4. Objects. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. Visitor. Section 9. Chief Rector. Section 10. Officers of the University. Section 11. The Chancellor. Section 12. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 13. The Pro-Vice-Chancellors. Section 14. Deans of Schools. Section 15. The Registrar. Section 16. The Finance Officer. Section 17. Other officers. Section 18. Authorities of the University. Section 19. The Court. Section 20. The Executive Council. Section 21. The Academic Council. Section 22. Other authorities of the University. Section 23. Planning Board. Section 24. Statutes. Section 25. Statutes how made. Section 26. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Regulations. Section 28. Annual report. Section 29. Annual accounts. Section 30. Conditions of service of employees. Section 31. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 32. Right to appeal. Section 33. Provident and pension funds. Section 34. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 35. Constitution of Committees. Section 36. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 37. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 38. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 39. Mode of proof of University record. Section 40. Power to remove difficulties. Section 41. Transitional provisions. Schedule 1.
